notes: Manual paste proposed for `data/raw/black_albion_sites.json` (the curated Tier I sites ledger). No canonical ledger was modified. The intake mixes Tier I-shaped archaeological + geological claims (York / Eburacum Late Roman burial, Sycamore Terrace 1901, ivory bangle, YORYM : 1996.115, Leach et al. 2009 'A Lady of York', strontium/oxygen isotopes, 'Vivas in Deo' inscription, Vale of York / Ouse-Foss / glacial terrace geology) with Tier III speculative framing ('Amenta Subsurface Core Extraction', 'Dual-material jet-ivory capacitors', 'fluvial siphon loop', counter-intelligence framing, system_lock vocabulary). Tier I-shaped claims preserved in the quarantined raw artifact, separated in the review note, itemised in the source review worksheet, and held behind the promotion gate in `docs/intake-review-workflow.md`. The 2026-06-12 intake task referenced a verbatim JSON record but did not attach one; the raw artifact includes a placeholder fenced block awaiting the actual paste before any forward motion.
